_meta.note: Machine-seeded Wave 13-14. Real translated strings in native script. Human review required before ratification.

speakFriend.title: Nena bwenzi, ndipo ulowe.
speakFriend.description: Liana Banyan yamezengedwa kuti isungunuke pa chilankhulo chilichonse. Chilankhulo chilichonse chili ndi mphoto imodzi ya kumasulira.
speakFriend.marksAwarded: Marks zapatsidwa (ma token a kutenga nawo gawo)
speakFriend.provisionalNotice: Mndandanda wa zilankhulo ndi mitengo ya Marks ndi ya kwa nthawi ino. Marks ndi ma token a kutenga nawo gawo, osati udziwe.
speakFriend.bountyDescription: Masulira Liana Banyan mu {{language}}. Peza {{marks}} Marks.
speakFriend.scopeCueCards: Gulu la Kadi za Malangizo Oyamba
speakFriend.scopeNavigation: Zizindikiro za njira ndi mauthenga olakwika
speakFriend.speakFounderTitle: Mawu a Woyambitsa: Chifukwa Cha Mawu Awa
speakFriend.speakFounderDesc: Mawu aliyense pa platform iyi atumikiridwa ndi chifukwa. Chiyambi cha mayina 26 ofunika kwambiri.
speakFriend.step1Body: Tsegurani Mphoto ya Kumasulira kuchokera pa Help Wanted.
speakFriend.step2Body: Masulira misintho yonse yofunika. Tumizani kudzera mu Bounty Poster.
speakFriend.step3Body: Atangowona, mudzalandira Marks ndipo mudzalembedwa mu IP Ledger.
speakFriend.subtitle: "Nena bwenzi, ndulowe."

languageSwitcher.tip: Gwiritsani ntchito mawu achinsinsi a zilankhulo zosiyanasiyana pa Chitseko cha Durin kuti mutsegule zinthu zapadera!
